title: Trump Administration Surpasses 605,000 Formal Deportations; 2.5M Total Departures
detail: The White House announced that as of April 3, more than 605,000 undocumented individuals had been formally deported since January 2025, with an additional 1.9 million self-deporting — totaling over 2.5 million departures. ICE's detention population reached approximately 68,000, the highest ever recorded. Critics continued to raise due process concerns, citing cases of US citizens and veterans wrongly detained or deported.

media.caption: US immigration tracker: 605,000+ formal deportations, 2.5M total departures
